text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One evening, T.M. Opera O and I are walking
around the shopping district...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ah, Trainer! Look ahead. A crowd has gathered...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Do you think it's a duel? If so, I must intercede.
Or perhaps—should I enter the fray?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We go and take a look. Just as I thought, there's
no duel going on.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand-prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
How about you? The prima donna over there!
Care to try your luck?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! I suppose I have no choice now that
I've been singled out among the audience.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A raffle is it? How amusing. I'm absolutely
fascinated with this spinning gadget you have
here.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, pluck that ticket from your breast
pocket. And obviously, only use your index and
middle fingers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's always a performance, even in the way one
pulls something from a pocket... I take out the
ticket as she asks and give it to the clerk.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Time to start the show, Trainer. Take hold of the
gadget's lever with me.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
For the moment of truth! Spin, O gears of fate!
Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Both of us raise one hand to the sky and turn the
raffle spinner with the other.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A small plastic ball drops from the spinner's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Oooh! 'Tis a ray of light from the heavens!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The grand-prize! Indeed, even the Goddess of
Luck is enamored with the star that I am.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha! Aaah ha ha haaa!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A hot spring vacation? How delightful. I would
dare depart this instant, if only I could.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But, alas, it's not in the cards while I still walk the
Overlord's path.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes. As I traverse this path, I should entertain no
other.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
If only the hot spring would come to me! Should it
not rush to my feet the moment I beckon?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Truly? They're surprisingly unaccommodating.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Then nothing can be done. I'll entrust you with
the ticket for now.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Close it with wax using the king's seal and keep it
safe until the appropriate time comes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And now the hot spring vacation ticket is in my
possession.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, hehehe... Can you see it? Because I most
definitely can!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
At the summit of the Overlord's path... is a hot
spring! Flowing freely from the very earth! Haaah
ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a hot spring vacation to look forward to,
Opera O's motivation shoots through the roof!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hah, first-prize! Luck certainly loves me. Even I, a
king of kings, am pleased by this!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But wait! Could it be?! The holy sword before us is
none other than... Excaliburger!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Behold! A single carrot stands plunged into the
stone of minced meat!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Only one worthy to rule is capable of withdrawing
it.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Which means I have not a moment to lose. We
must make haste to the kitchen!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I am prepared! Are you ready, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Once I draw the carrot, you are to say the words
of revelation. Understood?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ready... Pop!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Behold my glory! Haaah ha ha! Munch, munch...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
This holy sword... is delicious! Truly a treat for the
royal taste buds!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Opera O devours Excaliburger, content with both
the flavor and how much fun it is to eat.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hmn, second-prize. I typically fare better than
this. And yet...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Look at them all! With a little love from me, they
would make great appreciation gifts for my
adorning fans.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ah, perfect! Young boy over there, I bestow unto
thee a carrot.

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text: Eww... Keep it. I hate carrots.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! Whatever do you mean? This is no
ordinary carrot, but a loving gift from yours truly.

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text: Now I really don't want it...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Y-young boy! Wait!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
How could this be? Ah! I see now. One taste of
this carrot and all other foods would be rendered
unpalatable.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ahh! I cannot hold out any longer! Trainer, we
must eat all the carrots ourselves.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A ballet of carrots, je t'aime! We shall all dance
the dance of carrots together!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We eat the carrots while performing some weird
choreography. The taste is nothing to write home
about, but they're good all the same.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the
third-prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What? A single carrot?! How dare you insult
royalty!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: What do you have to say for yourself, carrot?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She vents her anger to the carrot. Of course, it
has no response.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I have no other choice than to sing a ballad of
sorrow, repurposing the carrot as a microphone.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It's times like this that make you sulk in your
sorrows, don a different mantel, and sing the
blues. Hit it, band!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ahhh, yes! Uh-huh! Mhmmm!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Welcooome to the carrot kingdooom! You
carotene soldier, un deux trois!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Opera O sings with desperation, but the kids
around the shops seem to like her song.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, woe... Worse has come to worst. The great
me... recipient of a consolation prize?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
To think I would receive nothing more than a
mere packet of tissue paper...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Notice how I say "tissue paper" and not simply "tissue." The former has a more beautiful ring to it.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Trainer! I issue a royal decree!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Take this packet of tissue paper and exchange it
for a hot spring vacation ticket!
choice_data_list: There's no way they'd go for that...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I will not hear your whining. Tragedy has befallen
me, and I have become the mad king, the Raving
Lord!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
If you fail, I will confine you to imprisonment in la
Conciergerie!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A bad luck of the draw has changed the king. It
doesn't seem like anything is going to improve
her mood.
